name: Zaytech Smart Online Order
description: Clover POS integration — imports Clover menu to WordPress, enables inline ordering via shortcode, orders print directly to Clover POS device.
condition: Only for clients using Clover POS. For Square clients, use custom Square ordering UI instead.
config_notes: Free core handles basic ordering. Pro tiers ($20-50/mo) add features like tipping, delivery zones, and scheduling. Client pays Zaytech directly.
